message.content:
PASS

Layout description: The login page features the ESGic logo at the top center. Below the logo, there is a horizontal separator line, followed by the text "CONNEXION" centered, and another horizontal separator line. This "Connexion" section (separator - CONNEXION text - separator) is positioned between the ESGic logo and the email form field ("Adresse email"). The email input field appears below this section, followed by the password field ("Mot de passe") and the login button ("Se connecter"). The "Connexion" separator is properly placed in its expected position.
